Evidence Docket 6.1

A proof page is not a marketing page.

This docket records the public-safe boundary for AGIJobManager Ascension: what is claimed, what is not claimed, what is canonical, and what remains outside this website.

Claimed

Static public evidence room, read-only operator planning console, canonical addresses, production URL, verification manifest.

Not claimed

No external audit completion, no Mainnet activation, no wallet authorization, no token approval, no production-fund authorization.

Canonical identities

AGIJobManager: 0xB3AAeb69b630f0299791679c063d68d6687481d1
AGIALPHA: 0xa61a3b3a130a9c20768eebf97e21515a6046a1fa
